exp1_small_data_kernel.headline: Quantum kernel tops out at AUC 0.52; tuned classical reaches 0.79.
exp1_small_data_kernel.claim_tested: Quantum kernels outperform classical models in the small-data regime (rare-disease cohorts).
exp1_small_data_kernel.what_we_found: Across every training size the quantum-kernel SVM stayed near chance (AUC max 0.52) while tuned RBF-SVM/XGBoost climbed to 0.79.
exp1_small_data_kernel.why: The generic ZZ feature-map kernel concentrates and fails to separate classes here.
exp1_small_data_kernel.caveats: Noiseless simulator, one synthetic cohort, off-the-shelf feature map (no kernel tuning).
exp1_small_data_kernel.for_a_beginner: A quantum 'similarity measure' is not automatically better; a well-tuned classical model won easily.

exp2_qaoa_optimization.headline: QAOA is near-optimal but slow; classical annealing matches it instantly.
exp2_qaoa_optimization.claim_tested: QAOA rivals classical solvers on healthcare combinatorial optimization (nurse scheduling).
exp2_qaoa_optimization.what_we_found: QAOA hit the exact optimum on 2/4 instances vs 4/4 for simulated annealing, and took up to 1151s on the simulator.
exp2_qaoa_optimization.why: QAOA reaches good solutions but offers no speed or quality edge over a cheap classical solver at these sizes.
exp2_qaoa_optimization.caveats: Tiny problem sizes, simulated (noiseless) QAOA; real hardware would be noisier and slower.
exp2_qaoa_optimization.for_a_beginner: Quantum optimization can find good answers, but here a standard classical method was faster and just as good.

exp3_generative_efficiency.headline: Quantum generator needs 24 params vs 17 classical — no efficiency win.
exp3_generative_efficiency.claim_tested: Quantum generators (QCBM) reach target distribution fidelity with far fewer parameters than classical generators.
exp3_generative_efficiency.what_we_found: The QCBM reached the target fidelity with 24 parameters; the classical model did it with 17. Comparable, with classical slightly leaner.
exp3_generative_efficiency.why: The headline 'quantum needs far fewer parameters' claim did not reproduce on this task.
exp3_generative_efficiency.caveats: Small 16-category distribution, noiseless simulator; results may differ at larger scale.
exp3_generative_efficiency.for_a_beginner: The famous 'quantum uses way fewer parameters' result did not hold up on a simple, fair test.
